briefdescription.para: Asynchronously connect and wait for SessionReady.

parameterdescription.para: Hostname or IP of the Tryll server.
TCP port the server is listening on.

simplesect.para: Future yielding a ready-to-use TryllClient. Calling future::get() propagates any TryllError raised during the handshake.

briefdescription.para: Blocking convenience wrapper over ConnectAsync.

parameterdescription.para: Hostname or IP of the Tryll server.
TCP port.
Maximum time to wait for SessionReady.
On connection failure, timeout, or a failed session handshake.

briefdescription.para: Spawn a local server and connect to it — recommended for single-process deployments where the client owns the server lifecycle.

detaileddescription.para: Equivalent to calling ManagedServer::Start followed by Connect, with correct cleanup if Connect throws. The returned ConnectedSession owns both the server process and the TCP session; on destruction it shuts the client down first, then terminates the server.

parameterdescription.para: Server launch options. serverOpts.exe is required.
Maximum time to wait for SessionReady after the server's TCP port becomes reachable.
If the server cannot be started, the TCP ready-probe times out, or the session handshake fails.

briefdescription.para: Asynchronous variant of RunAndConnect.

detaileddescription.para: Spawns a std::async task that calls RunAndConnect internally. Useful when the calling thread must not block during startup.

parameterdescription.para: Server launch options.

simplesect.para: Future yielding a ConnectedSession. Calling future::get() propagates any TryllError from the launch or handshake.

briefdescription.para: Configure session-level engines and options.

detaileddescription.para: Must be called after Connect and before CreateAgent or any model-management call.

parameterdescription.para: On server-reported errors or timeout.

briefdescription.para: Asynchronously create an agent with the given graph description.

parameterdescription.para: Fully-built graph description.
When true, the server serialises per-node execution data into TurnComplete.debug_info for every turn. Off by default for zero overhead in production; enable for QA/eval pipelines.

simplesect.para: When ConfigureSession was called with allowAutoModelDownloading=true, this call may block internally while models are being downloaded. The returned future completes when creation succeeds or fails definitively. DownloadProgress frames are emitted during the download (observable via the DownloadModel progress callback path).
Future yielding an AgentProxy bound to the new agent. Calling future::get() propagates any TryllError raised during validation or creation.

memberdef.argsstring: (const GraphDescription &graph, bool enableDiagnostics=false, std::optional< std::chrono::milliseconds > timeout=std::nullopt)
memberdef.name: CreateAgent

briefdescription.para: Blocking convenience wrapper over CreateAgentAsync.

parameterdescription.para: Fully-built graph description.
When true, the server serialises per-node execution data into TurnComplete.debug_info for every turn. Off by default; enable for QA/eval pipelines.
Maximum time to wait for CreateAgentResponse. Defaults to 30 seconds normally, or to 30 minutes when ConfigureSession was called with allowAutoModelDownloading=true (to accommodate model downloads).

simplesect.para: AgentProxy bound to the new server-side agent.

parameterdescription.para: On validation failures, server-reported errors (including ModelAutoDownloadFailed when allowAutoModelDownloading=true and a model cannot be downloaded), or timeout.

briefdescription.para: Asynchronously create a VoiceInput handle backed by the named STT model.

parameterdescription.para: Configuration including model name, input audio format, and VAD params.

simplesect.para: Future yielding a move-only VoiceInput handle. Calling future::get() propagates any TryllError.

briefdescription.para: Blocking convenience wrapper over CreateVoiceInputAsync.

parameterdescription.para: Configuration (see VoiceInputConfig).
Maximum time to wait for the server's response.
On server-reported errors (e.g. SttModelLoadFailed) or timeout.

briefdescription.para: Asynchronously shut down the connection.

detaileddescription.para: Pending requests are cancelled with TryllError. Idempotent.

simplesect.para: Future completing when the socket is closed.

briefdescription.para: Blocking convenience wrapper over ShutdownAsync.

parameterdescription.para: Maximum time to wait for a graceful close.
On timeout; socket errors during shutdown are suppressed.

briefdescription.para: Server-assigned session identifier.

simplesect.para: The session_id field received in SessionReady.

briefdescription.para: Request the list of models known to the server for the session's engine.

parameterdescription.para: Maximum time to wait for ListModelsResponse.

simplesect.para: Catalog entries, one per known model.

parameterdescription.para: On server-reported errors or timeout.

briefdescription.para: Start downloading a model on the server and block until complete.

detaileddescription.para: Progress frames are delivered via onProgress on the reader thread (invoked synchronously, so keep the callback fast and non-blocking).

parameterdescription.para: Catalog model name from models.json.
Optional per-chunk progress callback.
Maximum time to wait for DownloadComplete.
On server-reported errors, a DownloadComplete reporting failure, or timeout.

briefdescription.para: Explicitly load and pin a model into memory.

detaileddescription.para: The model stays in memory until UnloadModel is called, regardless of whether any agents are using it.

parameterdescription.para: Catalog model name from models.json.
Maximum time to wait; loading is slow for large GGUFs.
If the model cannot be resolved or loaded, or on timeout.

briefdescription.para: Send a dev-only debug command to the server and report the outcome.

detaileddescription.para: The server handles this only in non-Production builds with debug_commands.enabled. command is a verb (e.g. "crash"); for crash, payload is the mode token (nullderef / abort / throw / stackoverflow / fastfail; empty defaults to nullderef).

Waits up to timeout for one of: the connection dropping (a fatal verb succeeded → disconnected), an ErrorResponse (e.g. the channel is disabled → errorCode set), or a DebugCommandResponse (acknowledged). Does not throw on a server error — inspect the returned struct instead.

briefdescription.para: Unpin a previously pinned model.

detaileddescription.para: Freed immediately if no active contexts reference it; freed lazily when the last one is destroyed.

parameterdescription.para: Catalog model name previously pinned with LoadModel.
Maximum time to wait for the ack.
On timeout.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string_view name, const std::vector< std::string > &strings, std::chrono::milliseconds timeout=std::chrono::seconds{10})
memberdef.name: CreateStringStorage

briefdescription.para: Create a named StringStorage on the server from an inline list.

detaileddescription.para: The storage may then be referenced by name in node params via string_storage (e.g. on CannedResponseNode or HumanMessageGuardrailNode). Must be called before CreateAgent on any graph that references this storage name.

parameterdescription.para: Session-unique storage name.
Inline list of strings to store.
Maximum time to wait for the response.
On server-reported errors or timeout.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string_view name, std::string_view filePath, ::Tryll::StringStorageKind kind=::Tryll::StringStorageKind_List, std::chrono::milliseconds timeout=std::chrono::seconds{10})
memberdef.name: CreateStringStorageFromFile

briefdescription.para: Create a named StringStorage on the server from a server-side file.

detaileddescription.para: When kind is List (default), filePath must point to a newline-delimited *.txt file. When kind is Map or Multimap, filePath must point to a *.json array of {id, text} objects (where id is the key and text is the value).

parameterdescription.para: Session-unique storage name.
Server-side path to the source file.
Storage kind; defaults to List.
Maximum time to wait for the response.
On server-reported errors, missing file, or timeout.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string_view name, const std::vector< std::string > &keys, const std::vector< std::string > &values, ::Tryll::StringStorageKind kind=::Tryll::StringStorageKind_Map, std::chrono::milliseconds timeout=std::chrono::seconds{10})
memberdef.name: CreateStringStorageKeyed

briefdescription.para: Create a named StringStorage on the server from inline key/value pairs.

detaileddescription.para: kind must be Map or Multimap. For Map, all keys must be unique. For Multimap, duplicate keys are allowed. Both keys and values must be non-empty and the same length.

parameterdescription.para: Session-unique storage name.
Ordered list of keys.
Ordered list of values (one per key).
Map (default) or Multimap.
Maximum time to wait for the response.
On server-reported errors or timeout.

briefdescription.para: Destroy a named StringStorage on the server.

detaileddescription.para: Nodes that already hold the storage via shared_ptr keep it alive; this call only drops the session-level name mapping.

parameterdescription.para: Name passed to CreateStringStorage or CreateStringStorageFromFile.
Maximum time to wait for the response.
On server-reported errors or timeout.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string_view name, std::string_view configPath, std::string_view embeddingModel={}, std::optional< std::chrono::milliseconds > timeout=std::nullopt)
memberdef.name: CreateEmbeddedStringStorage

briefdescription.para: Create an EmbeddedStringStorage from a server-side config.

detaileddescription.para: Path A: the server loads records and (optionally) an on-disk HNSW index described by a *.json config referencing a *.kb.json records file.

If allow_auto_model_downloading was set in ConfigureSession and the required embedding model is absent, it will be downloaded before the storage is built. In that case the default timeout is automatically raised to 30 minutes; pass an explicit value to override.

parameterdescription.para: Session-unique storage name.
Server-side *.json path.
Optional catalog embedding-model name for cross-check; when non-empty must match the config's embedding_model.
Maximum time to wait for the response; embedding large corpora is slow.

simplesect.para: EmbeddedStorageInfo with name, record count, and dimension.

parameterdescription.para: On server-reported errors (including InvalidStringStorageData when embeddingModel mismatches the config) or timeout.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string_view name, const std::vector< std::string > &strings, std::string_view embeddingModel, std::optional< std::chrono::milliseconds > timeout=std::nullopt)
memberdef.name: CreateEmbeddedStringStorageFromStrings

briefdescription.para: Create an EmbeddedStringStorage from inline strings.

detaileddescription.para: Path B: the server embeds strings in memory with the named embedding model; no on-disk index is written.

If allow_auto_model_downloading was set in ConfigureSession and the required embedding model is absent, it will be downloaded before embedding begins. In that case the default timeout is automatically raised to 30 minutes; pass an explicit value to override.

parameterdescription.para: Session-unique storage name.
Inline records to embed.
Catalog embedding-model name (required).
Maximum time to wait; embedding is slow.

simplesect.para: EmbeddedStorageInfo with name, record count, and dimension.

parameterdescription.para: On server-reported errors or timeout.

briefdescription.para: Destroy a named EmbeddedStringStorage.

detaileddescription.para: Nodes that already hold the storage via shared_ptr keep it alive; this call only drops the session-level name mapping.

parameterdescription.para: Name passed to one of the Create variants.
Maximum time to wait for the response.
On server-reported errors or timeout.

briefdescription.para: TCP session to the Tryll server.

detaileddescription.para: Copyable — all copies share the same underlying connection via shared_ptr. The connection stays open until the last copy goes out of scope or Shutdown is called.
